title: rubus hirtus var. humiliformis
intro: Rubus hirtus var. humiliformis, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan bramble, is a variety of wild raspberry native to the Himalayan region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Rubus hirtus var. humiliformis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate digestive issues, soothe respiratory problems, and provide overall wellness benefits.
